title: Faust and the Devil
writer: Léopold Marchand, Johann Wolfgang von Goethe, Arrigo Boito
actors: Italo Tajo, Nelly Corradi, Gino Mattera
plot: Goethe's drama about Faust, a man who sells his soul to Mephistopheles in exchange for eternal youth, and the latter, with guileful glee, leads Faust to disaster along the paths of pleasure. Marguerite falls in love with Faust, an...
